name: Brian King Performance Golf
about: Brian King Performance Golf is a premier indoor golf training facility with locations in Maple Park, St. Charles, and at Prairie Landing Golf Club in West Chicago. The venue offers year-round coaching for golfers of all ages and skill levels, utilizing state-of-the-art technology and expert instruction. Both indoor bays and outdoor on-course coaching are available, with a focus on holistic player development including mental game training through their FlowCode program.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive coaching philosophy covering full swing, short game, and mental approach
Year-round access to indoor facilities with top-tier simulator technology
Proven success rate with junior golf development and high school team placement
Flexible lesson packages and private coaching options for adults and juniors

food_and_drink.notes: No information provided about on-site food service.
No information provided about alcohol service.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if clubs are provided, but as a private coaching facility, students are typically expected to bring their own equipment for lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No information is provided about food and drink policies on the website. It's recommended to contact the venue directly for specific policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify duration for simulator play as the primary focus is coaching rather than entertainment play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Brian King Performance Golf offers specialized junior coaching programs, private junior lessons, high school boot camps, and PGA Junior Golf Camps, making it very suitable for young golfers.
